title: Executive & Update Review
use_when: Executive & Update Review. Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to executive & update review. Trigger terms: executive-communication, leadership, storytelling, presentations, stakeholder-management.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Executive & Update Review when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Executive & Update Review stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Executive & Update Review fits Stakeholder Communication work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Executive & Update Review stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Executive & Update Review stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Executive & Update Review as generic Stakeholder Communication advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Executive & Update Review when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $executive-and-update-review to turn this executive context into a decision-ready Executive & Update Review stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
examples.expected_artifact: Executive & Update Review stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
